title: Enhanced Experience
description: A client-side modpack adding 3D models for items and detailed animations.
body:
✨ This modpack is a fanmade project inspired by the Bedrock addon "Actions & Stuff." It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original creators, but aims to bring a similar visual experience to Minecraft Java Edition.
Visual Focus & Performance on Java 🎨
The modpack uses the Fabric modloader and focuses on graphics enhancements and performance. It is a client-side package.
It includes a visual overhaul that changes standard textures into 3D models and adds animations.
Key Features:
3D Graphics: Replaces standard items and blocks with custom 3D models and textures. 💎🧱
Animations: Includes mob and detailed animations. 🧑‍🌾🐼
Performance: Includes optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and Iris for improved smoothness. 💨✅
Client-Side Only: Works on Vanilla or Fabric servers. 🌐👻
Installation
Simply download the modpack file and open it with a Modrinth-compatible launcher (e.g., Prism Launcher). 💻
